message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Client" as Client
actor "Computer" as Computer
actor "Cpu" as Cpu
actor "Disk" as Disk
actor "Memory" as Memory

Client --> Computer : "void main(String[] args)"
Computer --> Cpu : "Cpu cpu"
Computer --> Disk : "Disk disk"
Computer --> Memory : "Memory memory"

Computer --> Cpu : "void start()"
Computer --> Disk : "void start()"
Computer --> Memory : "void start()"

Computer --> Cpu : "void stop()"
Computer --> Disk : "void stop()"
Computer --> Memory : "void stop()"

@enduml
